goal: Build an operator-ergonomics scene: human operator (Avatar) and Franka share workspace; ergonomic posture checked via human-pose tracking. Realizes Phase 10 yrkesroll #18 (HFE / ergonomics specialist persona).
thoughts: Mixed human-robot workspace. Human is animated avatar (Mocap or rigged dummy), Franka picks parts from operator's bench.
Operator pose tracked at runtime. Ergonomic metric = wrist-elbow-shoulder angle deviation from neutral.
Ergonomics validation is offline (post-process the operator's joint_pos log).
For canonical-build: scene contains avatar + Franka + parts. animate the avatar reaching for parts.
Function-gate: standard pick-place delivery. Avatar's role is observational.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0.5, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

import_robot(file_path="OperatorAvatar", format="asset_library", dest_path="/World/Operator")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/Operator", position=[-0.5, -0.6, 0])

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.4, 0.2, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[-0.5, 0, 0.78], size=[0.30, 0.20, 0.10])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.2, 0.835], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Bin", "/World/Operator"],
)

play_animation(
    target_path="/World/Operator",
    animation_name="reach_and_grab",
    loop=True,
)
extension_notes: HFE canonical. Avatar is a moving obstacle for the robot. Real ergonomics analysis would compute REBA/RULA scores from operator's joint angles — not part of canonical itself.
failure_modes: OperatorAvatar SimReady asset may not exist — fallback to Cube placeholder
play_animation requires reach_and_grab animation pre-baked into asset
Operator marked as planning_obstacle — cuRobo may take longer to find collision-free path
